{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":701},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7514137003686118168","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事情节，故事脉络，都比较清晰，没有太多的废话，没有无脑的扯蛋，总体来说是一篇不错的爽文。如果语文水平再提高一点点，那就更好了，加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749526830,"group_id":"7364222126104005694","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3qQj/pYChJ17YU6xeGgRmQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cf0554065c9943a48b3f1f0e156cc88c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792415&x-signature=d%2FByn9JspTo3po%2FXfMgK%2F834YrU%3D","user_id":"94472456530","user_name":"凡心不改"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"94472456530","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1769021941,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7364222126104005694","book_info":{"abstract":"龙天意外魂穿夏国北王世子，开局觉醒系统，面临选择。
这是一个神奇的系统，除了固定时间给出选择权限，还可以完成任务获取选择机会。
每次出现选择的内容，都将决定龙天的一生，如何选择，如何发展，成了龙天必须要面对的。
为了获得更多的选择机会，将那无穷好处拿到手，龙天不得不走上一条争霸之路。
人生便是如此，面临无数次的选择，做与不做，做此行彼，不管如何选择，都要面对不同的结果。
而时间却不会重来，一切皆有定数。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d6ffde262093b5f13d43c735262d1503","author":"闲话多说","author_id":"","book_id":"7364222126104005694","book_name":"开局十大杀神！阁下如何应对？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7364222203556004414","read_count":"39277","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1643880"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"769","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,开局,争霸,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d0dcdfc350fcc5d659d987b83a3ad319~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394012&x-signature=fmhat%2FcAm8%2Bi4DPNdPaQUYyewSY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"50389510531","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1187"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读117小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwa
